use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF MODERATE TO SEVERE VASOMOTOR SYMPTOMS ASSOCIATED WITH MENOPAUSE

indications.text:
BRISDELLE is indicated for the treatment of moderate to severe vasomotor symptoms (VMS)
associated with menopause.
Limitations of Use:
BRISDELLE is not indicated for the treatment of any psychiatric condition. BRISDELLE has a
lower recommended paroxetine dosage than that used to treat major depressi...
